about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Find The Right Bike, an independent tool to help you discover the right bike for your needs and see how much you could save.

gear-guide.title: Gear Guide
gear-guide.description: The essential accessories every new bike rider needs - from helmets to locks to lights. Gear up for a safe and comfortable ride.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Basics
maintenance.description: Learn the basics of bike maintenance - from airing up tires to lubing your chain - and find resources to go deeper.

storage.title: Bike Storage
storage.description: No garage? No problem. Learn how to store your bike outdoors, indoors, or in small spaces - including tips for cargo bikes.
